mapper.select: SELECT ID AS id, LOG_ACTION_PLAN_TYPE AS logActionPlanType, LOG_ACTION_PLAN_TITLE AS logActionPlanTitle, LOG_ACTION_PLAN_CONTENT AS logActionPlanContent, LOG_ACTION_PLAN_CURRENT_PATTERN AS logActionPlanCurrentPattern, LOG_ACTION_PLAN_CURRENT_CONTENT AS logActionPlanCurrentContent, LOG_ACTION_PLAN_IMPROVED_PATTERN AS logActionPlanImprovedPattern, LOG_ACTION_PLAN_IMPROVED_CONTENT AS logActionPlanImprovedContent, LOG_RESULT_ID AS logResultId FROM TBL_LOG_ACTION_PLAN WHERE LOG_RESULT_ID = #{logResultId}
